title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Trinetra Softworks is looking for a Junior Frontend Developer to join our product team building dashboards for retail clients. You'll work closely with senior engineers to ship real features from day one, with mentorship built into your first 90 days.
responsibilities: Build and style responsive UI components using React
Convert Figma designs into pixel-accurate pages
Fix bugs reported by QA and write basic test cases
Participate in daily stand-ups and sprint planning
requirements: Diploma or degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Familiarity with React is a plus, not mandatory
Eagerness to learn and take feedback well

title: Business Development Associate
description: Join Orbit Fintech's growth team to help small businesses adopt our digital lending platform. This is a field-and-call role ideal for confident communicators who enjoy meeting new people every day.
responsibilities: Generate and qualify leads through calls and field visits
Explain loan products to shopkeepers and small business owners
Maintain daily activity reports in the CRM
Meet weekly targets for client onboarding
requirements: Any graduate, BBA preferred
Comfortable with daily local travel within Pune
Good spoken Hindi, Marathi, and English
Two-wheeler with valid license preferred

title: Customer Support Executive
description: Bluewave Technologies runs 24x7 support for our SaaS customers across India and the Middle East. We're hiring freshers for our voice and chat support team with rotational shifts and night shift allowance.
responsibilities: Respond to customer queries over chat, email, and calls
Log and escalate technical issues to the product team
Maintain a first-response time under 2 minutes
Document common issues for the internal knowledge base
requirements: Any graduate or final-year student
Clear spoken and written English
Willingness to work in rotational shifts
Basic computer literacy

title: Graphic Design Intern
description: Studio Marigold is a boutique branding studio working with D2C food and fashion brands. This 6-month internship offers hands-on exposure to real client projects, with a strong chance of full-time conversion.
responsibilities: Design social media creatives and packaging mockups
Assist senior designers in brand identity projects
Prepare print-ready files for vendors
Take part in weekly client review calls
requirements: Pursuing or completed a design diploma/degree
Working knowledge of Figma and Adobe Creative Suite
A portfolio of 3-5 sample works
Strong sense of typography and color

title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Pune Analytics Hub helps e-commerce brands make sense of their sales data. As a Junior Data Analyst, you'll clean datasets and build dashboards that business teams actually use to make decisions.
responsibilities: Clean and structure raw sales and marketing data
Build dashboards in Power BI for weekly business reviews
Write SQL queries to pull data for ad-hoc requests
Support senior analysts on monthly reporting
requirements: Degree in Statistics, Commerce, Engineering, or related field
Working knowledge of Excel and basic SQL
Exposure to Power BI or Tableau is a plus
Comfortable working with numbers and detail-oriented

title: HR Recruiter Trainee
description: Sahyadri Manpower Solutions places blue and grey collar talent for manufacturing clients across Maharashtra. We're hiring HR trainees to learn sourcing, screening, and onboarding from the ground up.
responsibilities: Source candidates through job portals and referrals
Conduct first-round telephonic screenings
Coordinate interview schedules with hiring managers
Maintain candidate trackers and offer letters
requirements: Graduate in any stream, HR specialization preferred
Confident phone and email communication
Comfortable using Excel and Google Sheets
Target-driven mindset

title: Junior Backend Developer (Node.js)
description: Work on the backend services that power Trinetra's retail dashboard product. You'll learn how to design APIs, work with databases, and ship code that's actually used by paying customers.
responsibilities: Build REST APIs using Node.js and Express
Write database queries and basic schema design in MongoDB
Debug production issues alongside senior developers
Document API endpoints for the frontend team
requirements: Degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
Basic understanding of JavaScript and Node.js
Familiarity with REST APIs and databases
Strong problem-solving fundamentals

title: Content Writer Intern
description: Wordloom Media creates blog content and newsletters for B2B SaaS companies. This internship is great for someone who loves writing and wants to learn how content drives business results.
responsibilities: Write blog posts and social captions on assigned topics
Research industry trends before drafting articles
Edit drafts based on editor feedback
Follow basic on-page SEO guidelines
requirements: Strong written English
Pursuing or completed a degree in any stream
A writing sample or blog link
Curiosity about technology and business topics

title: Operations Associate
description: Greenleaf Foods runs a cloud kitchen network across Pune. As an Operations Associate, you'll coordinate between kitchens, delivery partners, and the central team to keep things running smoothly.
responsibilities: Track daily inventory and raise purchase requests
Coordinate with delivery partners on order issues
Prepare daily operations reports for the manager
Visit kitchen units for quality and process checks
requirements: Any graduate, hospitality background a plus
Comfortable with Excel and basic reporting
Willing to travel between kitchen units in Pune
Organized and detail-oriented

title: QA Tester Trainee
description: Join Bluewave's QA team to test new features before they reach customers. You'll be trained on manual testing fundamentals and bug tracking tools used across the industry.
responsibilities: Execute test cases for new feature releases
Log bugs clearly with steps to reproduce
Retest fixed issues before release sign-off
Work closely with developers to clarify edge cases
requirements: Diploma or degree in Computer Science or IT
Logical thinking and attention to detail
Basic understanding of how web or mobile apps work
Willingness to learn testing tools on the job

title: Digital Marketing Executive
description: Help Orbit Fintech grow its presence across social and search channels. You'll run small campaigns, track performance, and learn paid marketing fundamentals from a lean, fast-moving team.
responsibilities: Schedule and publish posts across social channels
Assist in setting up and monitoring Google Ads campaigns
Track campaign performance using Google Analytics
Prepare weekly marketing performance summaries
requirements: Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, or related field
Basic understanding of social media platforms
Familiarity with Canva or similar design tools
Analytical mindset and willingness to learn ad platforms

title: Accounts Executive (Fresher)
description: We're hiring a fresher Accounts Executive to support invoicing, vendor payments, and basic bookkeeping for our growing staffing business. Tally training will be provided in the first two weeks.
responsibilities: Enter daily transactions into Tally
Prepare vendor invoices and follow up on payments
Reconcile bank statements weekly
Assist the finance manager during month-end closing
requirements: B.Com or equivalent degree
Basic knowledge of accounting principles
Comfortable with MS Excel
Tally knowledge is a plus, not mandatory

title: UI/UX Design Intern
description: Studio Marigold is expanding into product design for early-stage startups. As a UI/UX intern, you'll shadow senior designers on wireframes, prototypes, and usability sessions.
responsibilities: Create wireframes and low-fidelity prototypes in Figma
Assist in running basic user interviews and surveys
Maintain design files and component libraries
Present design concepts in internal reviews
requirements: Pursuing or completed a design-related course
Basic knowledge of Figma
Interest in how people use digital products
Portfolio of academic or personal projects

title: Inside Sales Representative
description: Drive bulk and corporate orders for Greenleaf's cloud kitchens through outbound calling and email outreach. Uncapped incentives on top of fixed salary for freshers who hit their targets.
responsibilities: Make outbound calls to corporate leads
Follow up on inbound enquiries within 30 minutes
Update lead status daily in the CRM
Coordinate with operations team for order fulfilment
requirements: Any graduate
Confident telephone communication in English and Hindi
Comfortable with target-based work
Basic computer skills

title: Junior Mobile App Developer (Flutter)
description: Help build the mobile companion app for our retail analytics platform. You'll work in a small mobile pod alongside one senior developer, learning Flutter and Firebase in a real production codebase.
responsibilities: Build screens and widgets using Flutter
Integrate Firebase authentication and notifications
Fix bugs reported during internal testing
Write basic unit tests for new features
requirements: Degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
Academic or personal project experience with Flutter or any mobile framework
Understanding of basic programming concepts
Willingness to learn Dart quickly

title: Front Office & Admin Executive
description: Manage the front desk and day-to-day office administration for our growing staffing firm. A great starting role for someone organized who enjoys keeping things running smoothly.
responsibilities: Greet visitors and manage incoming calls
Schedule meeting rooms and manage courier logs
Maintain office supplies and vendor contacts
Support HR with onboarding paperwork
requirements: Any graduate
Pleasant and professional communication
Comfortable with MS Office tools
Well organized and punctual

title: Social Media Intern
description: Manage and grow Instagram and LinkedIn pages for our client roster of SaaS and D2C brands. A fun, fast-paced internship for someone who's always a step ahead on social trends.
responsibilities: Plan and schedule a weekly content calendar
Design simple creatives using Canva
Track engagement and report weekly growth
Spot relevant trends for client brands to jump on
requirements: Active and savvy social media user
Pursuing or completed any degree
Basic design sense, Canva experience a plus
Reliable internet and a personal laptop

title: Junior Financial Analyst
description: Support the finance team with budgeting and reporting for client engagements. A strong stepping stone for commerce graduates who want to move into financial analysis or FP&A roles.
responsibilities: Assist in building monthly budget vs actual reports
Maintain financial models in Excel
Support audits with documentation requests
Prepare summary slides for client reviews
requirements: B.Com, BBA, or related finance degree
Strong Excel skills
Attention to detail with numbers
Good written communication for reporting
